user.title: Connect to Lydbro One
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Lydbro One bridge. The native TCP port is 6204 by default.

discovery_confirm.title: Lydbro One discovered
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to add **{name}** at `{host}` to Home Assistant?

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Lydbro One
reconfigure.description: Update the address of the bridge. The device must be the same physical unit that was originally configured.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Lydbro One bridge. Check that the device is powered, on the network, and that the Native TCP transport is selected in its config UI.
error.wrong_device: The bridge at that address reports a different device id. Reconfigure can only update the address of the same physical device.

abort.already_configured: This Lydbro One device is already configured.

device_not_found.message: Device {device_id} is not a Lydbro device.

safe_mode.title: Lydbro bridge in safe mode
safe_mode.description: The Lydbro bridge **{name}** at `{host}` entered safe mode after repeated crashes. The web UI is still reachable so you can fix the configuration and reboot the device. Once the bridge boots normally this notification will clear automatically.

low_battery.title: BeoRemote One battery low
low_battery.description: The BeoRemote One paired with this Lydbro bridge is at **{battery}%**. Charge or replace the batteries. This notification will clear automatically once the battery recovers.

ble_disconnected.title: BeoRemote One out of range
ble_disconnected.description: The BeoRemote One has been disconnected from the Lydbro bridge for more than {minutes} minutes. Short drops when the remote sleeps are normal; sustained drops usually mean the remote is out of range, the batteries are flat, or the bridge has lost BLE. This notification will clear automatically when the link comes back.
